site.name: MIRNE
site.fullName: Mission Internationale pour la Restauration des Nations par l'Evangile
site.tagline: International Mission for the Restoration of Nations by the Gospel
site.motto: Passion to serve, driven by love
site.alliance: MIRNE is a member of the Rwanda Evangelical Alliance (AER)

slides.title: Restoring Nations Through the Gospel
slides.subtitle: A holistic mission serving the whole person, through whole churches, with the whole Gospel.

slides.title: Serving Nations, Empowering Leaders
slides.subtitle: Pooling the anointings, callings, and competencies of God's servants from every part of the body of Christ.

slides.title: Social Ministry & Spiritual Ministry
slides.subtitle: Because true Gospel reaches body, soul, family, community and nation alike.

vision.subtitle: Our Vision
vision.title: The Bride Made Ready
vision.text: To prepare the Bride of Christ for His imminent return and to evangelize the world in obedience to the Great Commission found in Matthew 28:18–20.
vision.verse: "Go therefore and make disciples of all nations..." — Matthew 28:19

mission.subtitle: Our Mission
mission.title: Holistic Ministry
mission.intro: MIRNE is engaged in a Holistic mission — seeing Social Ministry and Spiritual Ministry as both being part of God's call to Christian service.

pillars.title: The Whole Gospel
pillars.text: The whole gospel brings salvation in its fullest sense, forgiveness of sins, inner conversion of individuals in regeneration and sanctification, physical and emotional healing, the transformation of social and economic relationships, reconciliation and peace overcoming sinful human divisions, and the ultimate triumph of Christ over the forces of evil on a cosmic scale.

pillars.title: The Whole Person
pillars.text: Holistic ministry views persons through God's eyes, as body-soul wholes created to live in wholesome community. Thus, the church ministers to every dimension of human need, and seeks wholeness at every level of society, individuals, families, communities, nations, and the global human family. Holistic ministry values every person as a unique and marvelous creation, bought by Christ, destined for eternity. Because of the Spirit's power to make all things new, a transformational perspective sees persons in terms of their potential rather than their problems

objectives.title: Create
objectives.text: To create a platform that fosters dynamic exchange among various ministries and their works, encouraging greater mutual knowledge and recognition.

objectives.title: Promote & Serve
objectives.text: To promote the convergence of the torches of the Gospel and serve as a catalyst supporting all evangelistic efforts aimed at hastening the coming of the Lord.

objectives.title: Train
objectives.text: To train and equip every Christian to develop a missionary mindset and be effective in their sphere of influence.

values: Church planting and growth through evangelism and teaching.
A supernatural anointing for the acts of the Holy Spirit.
A deep awareness of impactful mission in society.
A passion for the advancement of God's Kingdom.
Social initiatives that embody the life of the Kingdom of God.
A broad vision of the Church that transcends denominational and national boundaries.
Character development of God's servants for maturity.

contact.subtitle: Get In Touch
contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.description: MIRNE is a member of the Rwanda Evangelical Alliance (AER). We'd love to hear from you.
